body:
## Sprint
- Sprint ID: `S12-health-drift-detection`
- Objective: Detect drift/breakage/out-of-sync conditions deterministically, surface them in GUI with severity/root-cause/evidence links, and provide GUI-only repair actions (including Safe Mode) that restore stable state without terminal access.

## Whitelist + Budgets
- Whitelist: `src/**`, `docs/backlog/**`, `docs/sprints/README.md`, `docs/sprints/S12/**`, `tests/**`, `/tmp/**`
- Existing-file net-new budget: `<=120` lines (docs exempt)
- Existing-file max LOC budget: `<=1200`
- Function length budget: `<=80`

## AT Checklist
- [x] AT-S12-01 Repo drift emits explicit delta evidence; restore-to-checkpoint + preflight action path returns stable signal state.
- [x] AT-S12-02 Adapter crash emits `ADAPTER_DOWN`; bounded retries occur; deterministic auto-switch continuity hash recorded.
- [x] AT-S12-03 Missing pinned template emits hard-stop `TEMPLATE_DRIFT`; restore path clears blocker.
- [x] AT-S12-04 Safe Mode diagnosis report is deterministic and proves diagnosis-only (no agent invocation compliant path).

## Marker Lists Used
### HTML markers
- Unhandled Runtime Error
- Application error
- Hydration failed
- Cannot read properties of undefined
- TypeError:

### stderr markers
- ERROR
- UnhandledPromiseRejection
- EADDRINUSE
- ECONNREFUSED
- FATAL

## Evidence Paths
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/INDEX.md`
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/prestart/01_open_pr_inventory.json.txt`
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/preflight/*`
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/gates/{build.txt,test_all.txt,lint.txt}`
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/at/AT-S12-01_*.json`
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/at/AT-S12-02_*.json`
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/at/AT-S12-03_*.json`
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/at/AT-S12-04_*.json`
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/scope/{whitelist_eval.txt,maintainability_eval.txt}`
- `docs/sprints/S12/evidence/stoplight/{01_marker_list.txt,02_html_marker_grep.txt,03_stderr_marker_grep.txt}`
title: [S12] perf : health & drift detection
